title: Hud Compass Mod
description: Simple RPG-style hud compass with lodestone compass markers.
body:
# Hud Compass Mod A simple RPG-style HUD compass for Minecraft (Fabric).
## How It Works The compass displays the 8 cardinal directions and your last death location by default. It also supports custom pins using Lodestone Compasses in the inventory. Additionally, you can store the compasses in a bundle renamed to "Compass Bundle" to keep your inventory tidy. To add color to the pins, place the compass inside a colored bundle (I couldn't think of a better way to do it). ## Suggestions? Issues? Tell me [Github issues page](https://github.com/CaioFTNT/HudCompassMod/issues) ## Screenshots
